companies.name: Broadcom
companies.reason: Highlighted as one of the top AI boom beneficiaries and a key tech stock in focus for 2026.

companies.name: TSMC
companies.reason: Raised its 2026 outlook and expects continued sales growth supported by AI applications.

companies.name: AMD
companies.reason: Forecasts revenue above expectations due to strong demand for AI products, causing its shares to jump about 12%.

companies.name: Cerebras
companies.reason: Its IPO has orders exceeding 20 times available shares, indicating strong interest in its AI hardware.

companies.name: Arm Holdings
companies.reason: Its new in-house AI chip is expected to generate billions in revenue beyond its current licensing model.

companies.name: Samsung Electronics
companies.reason: Its shares surged on strong demand for high-bandwidth memory and AI-related chips.
